title: Monitor meat preservation process
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor meat preservation process demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for preserving meat

pcs.text: Identify and explain types of preservation processes used by the meat industry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain types of preservation processes used by the meat industry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain types of preservation processes used by the meat industry.

pcs.text: Identify meat quality required for preservation processes according to customer and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify meat quality required for preservation processes according to customer and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify meat quality required for preservation processes according to customer and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for the preservation of meat, and address associated risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for the preservation of meat, and address associated risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for the preservation of meat, and address associated risks.

pcs.text: Prepare ingredients and equipment required for the preservation process according to product specifications, hygiene and sanitation, and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare ingredients and equipment required for the preservation process according to product specifications, hygiene and sanitation, and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare ingredients and equipment required for the preservation process according to product specifications, hygiene and sanitation, and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for preserving meat

elements.title: Monitor meat preservation

pcs.text: Inspect and monitor product and process to ensure meat is preserved to specifications, health, hygiene and customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and monitor product and process to ensure meat is preserved to specifications, health, hygiene and customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and monitor product and process to ensure meat is preserved to specifications, health, hygiene and customer requirements.

pcs.text: Regularly monitor equipment or processes involved in the preservation process at critical control points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Regularly monitor equipment or processes involved in the preservation process at critical control points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Regularly monitor equipment or processes involved in the preservation process at critical control points.

pcs.text: Monitor and follow procedures to ensure quality and hygiene of products at all times
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and follow procedures to ensure quality and hygiene of products at all times?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and follow procedures to ensure quality and hygiene of products at all times.

pcs.text: Implement procedures for rejecting, reprocessing and/or recall for products that do not meet specifications or hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement procedures for rejecting, reprocessing and/or recall for products that do not meet specifications or hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement procedures for rejecting, reprocessing and/or recall for products that do not meet specifications or hygiene requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records of meat preservation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records of meat preservation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor meat preservation
